title: Studying for finance jobs that may disappear in 10 years? 8 skills to stay relevant
description: The finance industry is undergoing a rapid transformation driven by artificial intelligence, automation, and data analytics. Tasks that once required large teams of analysts or accountants are increasingly being handled by algorithms capable of processing enormous volumes of financial information within seconds.For students and early-career professionals entering finance today, this raises an important question: are you training for roles that may not exist a decade from now?While finance careers are not disappearing, many routine tasks are being automated. The professionals who thrive in the future will be those who combine financial expertise with technological understanding and strategic thinking.The future of finance will belong not just to analysts — but to AI-enabled decision-makers. Training for finance jobs that may not exist longer term?
